name: skill-finder
description: System for discovering and cataloging available skills in the KI-Dev-Agent ecosystem
author: KI-Dev-Agent Team

tools.name: list_skills
tools.description: List all available skills in the system

tools.name: find_skill_by_name
tools.description: Find a skill by its name

skill_name.description: Name of the skill to find

tools.name: find_skills_by_tag
tools.description: Find skills that match specific tags

match_all.description: Whether skill must match all tags (true) or any tag (false)

tools.name: get_skill_metadata
tools.description: Get detailed metadata for a specific skill
